_comment: HTTP response envelope from POST /api/ai/generate. FinalDataJson is the escaped JSON string stored in Resume.FinalData. JobTitleSuggestions and SkillSuggestions are ephemeral — shown in the UI but never written to the database.
finalDataJson: {"settings":{"summaryType":"Summary","descriptionFormat":"Bulleted"},"content":{"personal":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Doe","email":"john.doe@example.com"},"summary":"Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 5+ years of expertise delivering high-availability backend systems and microservices.","experience":[{"id":"exp_001","description":"\u2022 Spearheaded the migration of a monolithic REST API portfolio to ASP.NET Core microservices, improving system uptime from 98.2% to 99.9%.\n\u2022 Cut average response latency by 40% through targeted optimisation."}]}}
